lessons.rule: The impact component must run inside a Sequence whose frame zero is local to that beat. Sample the latter half of the beat and reject the render if the expected phrase is not visibly full-screen.
lessons.regression: quality-review impact sequence must pass visual text confirmation

lessons.learnedFrom: User requirement: real browser and X evidence
lessons.trigger: The spoken claim references an official launch, announcement, page, product, or X post.
lessons.rule: Use browser-evidence or x-post-evidence before planning. Attach the returned evidenceId to an evidence beat. Never replace source evidence with a recreated X card or invented browser UI.
lessons.regression: captured evidence must be used and visually confirmed inside the rendered Safari scene

lessons.trigger: A timed transcript contains a word matching an impact phrase or keyword.
lessons.rule: Persist the absolute word timestamp as impactAtMs and land the full-screen flash/ring pulse there. Never derive semantic sync from a fixed percentage of the beat duration.
lessons.regression: impact QA samples must be centered on impactAtMs and the rendered phrase must visibly land there
